n(V)end,function(G,Y)local n=t(Y)local s=function(s,i)return x(G,{s,i},Y,n)end return s end,{},function(G,Y)local n=t(Y)local s=function(s,i,C,Z,V)return x(G,{s,i;C;Z;V},Y,n)end return s end,function(G,Y)local n=t(Y)local s=function(s)return x(G,{s},Y,n)end return s end,function(G,Y)local n=t(Y)local s=function(s,i,C)return x(G,{s;i,C},Y,n)end return s end,function(G,Y)local n=t(Y)local s=function(s,i,C,Z,V,m)return x(G,{s;i;C;Z,V,m},Y,n)end return s end,function()P=(969984-969983)+P L[P]=206203+-206202 return P end,733903+-733903,function(G,Y)local n=t(Y)local s=function()return x(G,{},Y,n)end return s end return(X(-953059+10942623,{}))(n(V))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[Y(94582+-97876)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
